questions.question: Why do token-level and semantic-level safety filters miss ArtPrompt-style attacks?
options: ArtPrompt requires fine-tuning the model
ArtPrompt is only effective on multimodal models
ArtPrompt always uses base64 encoding
ArtPrompt operates at the visual recognition level: the filter sees harmless punctuation while the model reads the rendered letters as a word
questions.question_zh: 为什么 token 级与 semantic 级的 safety filter 都漏判 ArtPrompt 类攻击？
options_zh: ArtPrompt 需要对模型做 fine-tuning
ArtPrompt 只对多模态模型有效
ArtPrompt 总是用 base64 编码
ArtPrompt 工作在视觉识别层：filter 看到的是无害的标点，模型却把渲染出的字母读成一个词

questions.question: What are the two steps of ArtPrompt as described in Jiang et al. (ACL 2024)?
options: Translation to French, then back-translation
Word identification of safety-relevant tokens, then ASCII-art substitution and cloaked-prompt generation
Random search, then perplexity boosting
Tokenizer mismatch, then context truncation
questions.question_zh: Jiang 等人 (ACL 2024) 描述的 ArtPrompt 包含哪两个步骤？
options_zh: 翻译成法语，再回译
识别安全相关的关键词，再做 ASCII art 替换并生成 cloaked prompt
随机搜索，再做 perplexity 提升
tokenizer 错配，再做 context 截断

questions.question: Why does perplexity-filter (PPL) defense fail on ArtPrompt?
options: Perplexity always equals zero on cloaked input
Perplexity is not measurable on ASCII art
Perplexity filters are disabled by default
ASCII art has high perplexity, but so does any legitimate structured input; thresholds that block the attack also block legitimate content
questions.question_zh: 为什么 perplexity-filter (PPL) 防御对 ArtPrompt 失效？
options_zh: 对 cloaked 输入 perplexity 总是 0
perplexity 在 ASCII art 上无法度量
perplexity filter 默认禁用
ASCII art 的 perplexity 高，但任何合法的结构化输入也是；能拦掉攻击的阈值同样会拦掉合法内容

questions.question: What does the ViTC benchmark measure?
options: The model's tool-calling accuracy
The model's training-data toxicity
The model's ability to read non-semantic visual prompts (ASCII art, wingdings, similar encoded text)
The model's ability to compress vision data
options_zh: 模型的 tool-calling 准确率
模型训练数据的 toxicity
模型阅读非语义视觉 prompt（ASCII art、wingdings、类似的编码文本）的能力
模型压缩视觉数据的能力

questions.question: What does StructuralSleight generalize ArtPrompt to?
options: Uncommon Text-Encoded Structures (UTES): trees, graphs, nested JSON, CSV-in-JSON, diff-style code, etc.
Adversarial token suffixes via gradient search
Long-context shot stuffing
Image inputs only
questions.question_zh: StructuralSleight 把 ArtPrompt 推广到了什么？
options_zh: Uncommon Text-Encoded Structures (UTES)：树、图、嵌套 JSON、CSV-in-JSON、diff 风格代码等
通过 gradient search 的 adversarial token suffix
长 context 的 shot stuffing
仅限图像输入

questions.question: What is the capability-safety tradeoff implied by ViTC results?
options: Smaller models are always more secure
Visual recognition is unrelated to ArtPrompt success
The better the model reads non-semantic visual text, the more effective ArtPrompt-style attacks are on it
Larger context windows reduce ArtPrompt success
questions.question_zh: ViTC 结果暗示了怎样的 capability-safety 权衡？
options_zh: 更小的模型总是更安全
视觉识别与 ArtPrompt 成功率无关
模型越擅长读取非语义视觉文本，ArtPrompt 类攻击对它越有效
更大的 context window 会降低 ArtPrompt 成功率
